agent_spec.task: I need the root cause analysis and mitigation steps for latency incident 13. Can you look it up in the knowledge base and summarize the key points?

tools.description: Search the internal documentation knowledge base. Takes a query string and a top_k integer specifying the maximum number of results to return. Returns a list of matched document objects, each containing a doc_id and title.
Retrieve the full content of a document by its doc_id. Takes a single doc_id string and returns the full document text.
